
#### Parsing Rules

##### FortiGate Parsing Rule

Updated the FortiGate Parsing Rule parsing rule logic:

* Limited the fields generated by the integration to only those that are relevant only to the FortiGate CEF logs format.
* For support of additional custom fields to work with the Parsing Rule, please use an [EXTEND section](https://docs-cortex.paloaltonetworks.com/r/Cortex-XSIAM/Cortex-XSIAM-Documentation/EXTEND-Section).
